rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: PowerShell Startup Folder Persistence

rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell Startup Folder Persistence
id: 07fce851-4cab-4ea5-880c-daf9d18bb180
status: experimental
description: "Yellow Cockatoo Windows Startup folder for persistence. Not unique to\
  \ Yellow Cockatoo, \nthis detection opportunity is likely to identify persistence\
  \ mechanisms in multiple \nthreats. In the context of Yellow Cockatoo, this persistence\
  \ mechanism eventually \nlaunches the command-line script that leads to the installation\
  \ of a malicious DLL. Part \nof the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/yellow-cockatoo/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1547
- attack.t1547.001
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    TargetFilename|endswith: .lnk
  selection2:
    TargetFilename|contains: start menu\programs\startup
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
